name: LG EXAONE Deep 32B
license: EXAONE AI Model License Agreement 1.1 - NC
archDisplay: Dense Transformer, 64 layers, GQA (40 Q-heads / 8 KV-heads), <thought>-tag CoT reasoning
note: Reasoning-specialized <thought>-tag CoT model rivaling much larger models on AIME/MATH.

results.notes: MMLU accuracy for the 32B model, confirmed via two independent fetches of the arXiv paper (html v1 and v2, Table 3). Not present on the abbreviated GitHub README / HF model-card comparison table, only in the full paper.
MMLU-Pro accuracy for the 32B model, confirmed via two independent fetches of the arXiv paper (html v1 and v2, Table 3).

verificationNotes: Existence and release date (2025-03-18) confirmed on GitHub README and HF model card. Params (30.95B, rounded 32B), 32K context, and 64-layer/GQA(40Q/8KV) architecture confirmed via HF card and independent search (model shares EXAONE-3.5-32B backbone). All 4 benchmark rows (MATH-500 95.7, AIME2024 72.1/90.0, GPQA-Diamond 66.1, LiveCodeBench 59.5) verbatim-confirmed on both the HF card and GitHub README — no changes.
